name: io.github.fzlzjerry/uniprotkb-mcp
title: UniProt
description: UniProt REST API over MCP: search, entries, FASTA, ID mapping, taxonomy, UniRef, proteomes.

environmentVariables.name: UNIPROT_MCP_CONTACT
environmentVariables.description: Contact email included in the User-Agent sent to UniProt (UniProt asks clients to identify themselves; optional).
